purpose: Track Scene Editor modularisation cleanup, merged ownership consolidation and the acceptance gate before wider cross-app linking work.
currentStatusSummary: PR #37 is merged on current main and implements the required ownership consolidation after the v0.34 failed acceptance. No checked record yet confirms the deployed post-merge manual acceptance gate. Scene Editor is implemented but not accepted as stable for further expansion until that gate is recorded.

deliveries.title: Split Scene Editor core into modular files and archive legacy helpers
deliveries.result: Core split and legacy archive cleanup delivered as v0.30-scene-core-split.

deliveries.title: Scene Editor: rename active runtime modules for v0.31
deliveries.result: Numbered live feature modules were renamed to ownership-based filenames and stale helper messaging was removed; delivered as v0.31-runtime-module-cleanup.

deliveries.title: Scene Editor v0.32 — fix unlocked-aspect resize, settings search, Shadow Blur and numeric control restyle
deliveries.result: Delivered v0.32-controls-resize-search, but deployed manual acceptance failed slider dragging, editable numeric value input and aspect-off visible stretching.

deliveries.title: v0.33 — Inspector and controls repair
deliveries.result: Delivered v0.33-inspector-controls-repair with repaired controls and floating Object Inspector before the later v0.34 review cycle.

deliveries.title: Scene Editor v0.34 — live acceptance repairs for inspector, wrap, pan and project status
deliveries.result: Delivered v0.34-live-acceptance-repair, but deployed manual acceptance failed because selected-object controls could affect another object.

deliveries.title: Consolidate Scene Editor object, movement and UI ownership
deliveries.result: Delivered v0.35-owner-consolidation. Required ownership implementation is present on main; post-merge deployed manual acceptance remains to be recorded.

blockerRule: Do not describe merged implementation as accepted stable behaviour until its required deployed manual acceptance result is recorded. No placeholders, patch-on-patch workaround or manual reconstruction from partial evidence.
implementationRule: Do not create new helper, patch or override files for follow-up Scene Editor work. Fix or add behaviour in permanent owning modules and existing stylesheet files only.

tasks.title: Deliver modular Scene Editor core and normalised runtime names
tasks.description: PRs #6 and #11 delivered the modular core split, archived unused legacy files and renamed retained runtime feature files to ownership-based names.

tasks.title: Record v0.32 deployed acceptance failure
tasks.description: PR #13 delivered v0.32-controls-resize-search, but deployed manual acceptance failed for slider dragging, editable numeric values and aspect-off visible stretching.

tasks.title: Deliver v0.33 inspector and controls repair
tasks.description: PR #16 delivered repaired slider/readout behaviour, aspect-off correction and the floating Object Inspector organisation as v0.33-inspector-controls-repair.

tasks.title: Record v0.34 wrong-object acceptance failure
tasks.description: PR #19 delivered v0.34-live-acceptance-repair. Manual acceptance established that controls for the selected ball could affect the box, requiring ownership consolidation rather than another small repair.

tasks.title: Consolidate Scene Editor selected-object, movement and UI ownership
tasks.description: PR #37 merged v0.35-owner-consolidation. Renderer, transform controls, stage drag and focused modules now own their defined behaviours; overlapping aspect/card/offscreen active imports were removed from index.html.

tasks.title: Confirm v0.35 ownership consolidation in deployed browser
tasks.description: Run the deployed manual acceptance gate before declaring Scene Editor stable or beginning new feature/cross-app integration work.
checks: Selecting and editing the ball changes only the ball.
Selecting and editing the box changes only the box.
A square image wraps to a visibly square area on the 16:9 stage.
Border is visible, toggles correctly and is object-specific.
Layer reorder and Recalculate persist after rerender and save/reload, including locked layers.
Move-handle drag, editable X/Y, offscreen positions and middle-mouse pan work through the intended route.
Asset picker, object preview, menu actions, import and Download JSON remain functional.
Controls do not duplicate or reinstall after waiting, and no console errors appear.

tasks.title: Define future Scene Events / Triggers cross-app contract
tasks.description: Future integration task only: define scene enter, object interact/pickup, portal/exit, conditions, FX/sound triggers, object action/animation triggers and quest-state updates across Scene Editor, Archetype Object Creator, Effect Editor, Quest Builder and Project Editor. Do not begin before v0.35 manual acceptance is recorded.

testsExecuted: Codex v0.30 pass: node --check, served HTTP asset checks, template manifest fetch and temporary Playwright smoke test.
User v0.30 pass: deployed page opened and core split appeared functional.
Codex v0.31 pass: node --check, served HTTP asset checks, template manifest fetch and Playwright smoke coverage of version, selection, transform, feature controls and API compatibility.
User v0.31 pass: deployed page loaded, restored local scene and exposed the remaining unlocked aspect-ratio resize defect.
Codex v0.32 pass: static, served HTTP and Playwright checks were run before PR #13; deployed manual acceptance subsequently failed.
PR #37 source/diff verification records that ownership consolidation was implemented in permanent files and overlapping active imports were removed.
No completed deployed manual acceptance result for v0.35-owner-consolidation was found in checked records.
nextStep: Run and record deployed manual acceptance for v0.35-owner-consolidation before new Scene Editor feature work or cross-app integration begins.
